ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spec_files" (
  "spec_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrometry file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the spectrometry file */,
  "file_index" INTEGER /* Index number associated with the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .txt, .mzML) */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectra" (
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan */,
  "spec_file_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the spectrometry file */,
  "scan_number" INTEGER /* The scan number of the experiment */,
  "frag_method" TEXT /* Method of fragmentation used (e.g., CID) */,
  "precursor" REAL /* Precursor ion mass */,
  "isotope_error" REAL /* Isotope error value */,
  "precursor_error_ppm" REAL /* Error in precursor measurement (in ppm) */,
  "charge" INTEGER /* Charge state of the observed ion */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the instrument used for the scan */,
  "scan_type" TEXT /* Type of the scan (e.g., MS1, MS2) */,
  "scan_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scan started */,
  "scan_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scan ended */,
  "isolation_window" TEXT /* Isolation window used for the scan */,
  "collision_energy" REAL /* Collision energy used during fragmentation */,
  "ion_injection_time" REAL /* Ion injection time for the scan */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the mass spectrometer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_spec_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_file_id") REFERENCES spec_files ("spec_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide sequence */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the scan from which the peptide is identified */,
  "peptide_sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the peptide */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the protein associated with the peptide */,
  "modification" TEXT /* Any modifications to the peptide sequence */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the peptide in the protein sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the peptide in the protein sequence */,
  "missed_cleavages" INTEGER /* Number of missed cleavages in the peptide sequence */,
  "mass" REAL /* Theoretical mass of the peptide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES spectra ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the protein in a database */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Common name of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Full amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isotope_distribution" TEXT /* Isotope distribution of the protein */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the protein is derived */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Gene name associated with the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the peptide being scored */,
  "denovo_score" REAL /* DeNovo score assigned to the peptide */,
  "msgf_score" REAL /* MSGF score assigned to the peptide */,
  "spec_evalue" REAL /* Spectral E-value assigned to the peptide */,
  "evalue" REAL /* Overall E-value for the peptide */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value for false discovery rate control */,
  "pep_q_value" REAL /* Peptide Q-value for validation */,
  "delta_score" REAL /* Difference between the best and next best scores */,
  "localization_score" REAL /* Localization score for the peptide */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the peptide identification */,
  "search_engine" TEXT /* Search engine used for scoring (e.g., MSGF+, Mascot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user accessing the data */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the scan being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES spectra ("scan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the project to which the experiment belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_spectra" (
  "experiment_spectra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment-scan association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiment */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the scan related to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_spectra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_spectra_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES spectra ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_spectra_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the instrument */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the project */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
